description: Leading digital transformation initiatives for Southeast Asia's premier home goods distributor, developing production-ready platforms that serve thousands of customers across multiple countries.

overview.scale: 30+ global home brands distributed across Philippines, Singapore, and Malaysia
overview.marketLeadership: 34 years of excellence with 6 showrooms and 13 retail locations
overview.brandPortfolio: Premium brands including KitchenAid, Coleman, Levoit, Miele, Sub-Zero, Wolf, Sealy, Tempur
overview.businessModel: Premium brand distributor for consumer goods, home furnishings, and wellness products

responsibilities: Full-stack development of enterprise applications using modern tech stacks
Cross-functional collaboration across specialized teams (internal tools, data engineering, product management)
Infrastructure as Code implementation using SST and AWS services
Performance optimization and business impact planning for high-volume applications
Early adoption of emerging technologies and frameworks
Continuous learning and skill development to stay ahead of technology trends
Thriving in fast-paced innovation environment, quickly adopting modern technologies including TypeScript, NextJS, ShadCN, Python, FastAPI, AWS, and SST
Modernizing legacy systems from C#/jQuery to TypeScript-based solutions
Designing component reusability architecture for scalable multi-brand operations
Implementing automated workflows for HR and accounting departments
